options.content:
# Reports
Client-level reporting for Rogue Foods United (rfu-oregon). Mirrors Aetna Medicaid monthly report format. Each report has an **(ℹ️) info panel** explaining every field, its source table, and how to interpret it. All stat tiles are clickable and link directly to the detail tables below them.

## [📊 Card Status](/d/onefintech-rpt-card-status/card-status-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success

FIS Person IDs, CUIDs, and Card IDs stamped after reconciliation. One row per member.

**Source tables:** `dim_card, dim_member`

## [📋 Enrollment](/d/onefintech-rpt-enrollment/enrollment-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success

SRG file funnel from STAGED → ACCEPTED. Count by correlation ID and record type.

**Source tables:** `fact_enrollments, dim_member`

## [✅ Reconciliation](/d/onefintech-rpt-reconciliation/reconciliation-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success

FIS result codes per record. MATCHED vs UNMATCHED. Match rate and batch file detail.

**Source tables:** `fact_reconciliation, dim_member`

## [💳 Authorization & Declines](/d/onefintech-rpt-auth/authorization-and-declines-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success / Finance

Auth approvals, declines, and reversals from STDAUTH XTRACT. Decline rate by purse.

**Source tables:** `fact_authorization`

## [💰 Utilization Summary](/d/onefintech-rpt-utilization/utilization-summary-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success / Finance

Purse-level closing balances and purchase totals. Utilization rate by purse.

**Source tables:** `fact_account_balance, fact_monetary`

## [🛒 Spend Item Detail](/d/onefintech-rpt-spend/spend-item-detail-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success / Finance

UPC-level item spend from STDFSID XTRACT. Top items, category breakdown, basket size.

**Source tables:** `fact_spend_item, fact_spend_item_detail`

## [💵 Monetary Transactions](/d/onefintech-rpt-monetary/monetary-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success / Finance

All settled transactions from STDMON XTRACT — value loads, purchases, reversals.

**Source tables:** `fact_monetary`

## [🔔 Non-Monetary Events](/d/onefintech-rpt-nonmon/non-monetary-report)

**Audience:** Operations & Client Success

Card lifecycle events from STDNONMON XTRACT — enrollment, activation, status changes.

**Source tables:** `fact_non_monetary`

## [⚙️ Client Configuration](/d/onefintech-rpt-ccx/client-configuration-report)

**Audience:** Product — Government Solutions

Program, purse, and package configuration from CCX XTRACT. Purse limits and spend categories.

**Source tables:** `dim_subprogram, dim_purse_config, dim_package`
